title: ranunculus lejospermus subsp. ololeucos
intro: Ranunculus lejospermus subsp. ololeucos is a rare species of flowering plant, commonly known as the 'yellow buttercup', belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus lejospermus subsp. ololeucos include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
